'''âb-k-k''' ('''kabakak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valuate|valuate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valuate|valuate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-k-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabakak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakak|thibakak]] || [[word:jibakak|jibakak]] || [[word:shibakak|shibakak]] || [[word:kibakak|kibakak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakak|thuthubakak]] || [[word:jujubakak|jujubakak]] || [[word:shushubakak|shushubakak]] || [[word:kukubakak|kukubakak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubakak|thubakak]] || [[word:jubakak|jubakak]] || [[word:shubakak|shubakak]] || [[word:kubakak|kubakak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubakak|thubakak]] || [[word:jubakak|jubakak]] || [[word:shubakak|shubakak]] || [[word:kubakak|kubakak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebakak|thebakak]] || [[word:jebakak|jebakak]] || [[word:shebakak|shebakak]] || [[word:kebakak|kebakak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobakak|thothobakak]] || [[word:jojobakak|jojobakak]] || [[word:shoshobakak|shoshobakak]] || [[word:kokobakak|kokobakak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakak|thobakak]] || [[word:jobakak|jobakak]] || [[word:shobakak|shobakak]] || [[word:kobakak|kobakak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakak|thobakak]] || [[word:jobakak|jobakak]] || [[word:shobakak|shobakak]] || [[word:kobakak|kobakak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbakak|thĂŠbakak]] || [[word:jĂŠbakak|jĂŠbakak]] || [[word:shĂŠbakak|shĂŠbakak]] || [[word:kĂŠbakak|kĂŠbakak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabakak|thathabakak]] || [[word:jajabakak|jajabakak]] || [[word:shashabakak|shashabakak]] || [[word:kakabakak|kakabakak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakak|thabakak]] || [[word:jabakak|jabakak]] || [[word:shabakak|shabakak]] || [[word:kabakak|kabakak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakak|thabakak]] || [[word:jabakak|jabakak]] || [[word:shabakak|shabakak]] || [[word:kabakak|kabakak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabakak|shabakak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabakak|goshabakak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabakak|gokishabakak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabakaknĂŒ|shabakaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaknknĂŒ|goshabakaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakaknĂŒ|gokishabakaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabakakshĂ«|shabakakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabakaknkshĂ«|goshabakaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabakakshĂ«|gokishabakakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakakro|shabakakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaknkro|goshabakaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakakro|gokishabakakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakakmu|shabakakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaknkmu|goshabakaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakakmu|gokishabakakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabakaksher|shabakaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabakaknksher|goshabakaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabakaksher|gokishabakaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabakakng|shabakakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabakaknkng|goshabakaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabakakng|gokishabakakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabakakya|shabakakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabakaknkya|goshabakaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabakakya|gokishabakakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabakakyam|shabakakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabakaknkyam|goshabakaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabakakyam|gokishabakakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakaknĂŒshĂ«|shabakaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshabakaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishabakaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakaknĂŒro|shabakaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaknknĂŒro|goshabakaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakaknĂŒro|gokishabakaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakaknĂŒmu|shabakaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaknknĂŒmu|goshabakaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakaknĂŒmu|gokishabakaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakakshĂ«nĂŒ|shabakakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabakaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabakakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakakshĂ«ro|shabakakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaknkshĂ«ro|goshabakaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakakshĂ«ro|gokishabakakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakakshĂ«mu|shabakakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaknkshĂ«mu|goshabakaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakakshĂ«mu|gokishabakakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakakronĂŒ|shabakakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaknkronĂŒ|goshabakaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakakronĂŒ|gokishabakakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakakroshĂ«|shabakakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaknkroshĂ«|goshabakaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakakroshĂ«|gokishabakakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakakromu|shabakakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaknkromu|goshabakaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakakromu|gokishabakakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakakmunĂŒ|shabakakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaknkmunĂŒ|goshabakaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakakmunĂŒ|gokishabakakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakakmushĂ«|shabakakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaknkmushĂ«|goshabakaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakakmushĂ«|gokishabakakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakakmuro|shabakakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaknkmuro|goshabakaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakakmuro|gokishabakakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
